column1: # 4MB single-OTA partition layout for the T-Display (and other 4MB boards).
# One ~3MB factory app slot. This trades away A/B OTA rollback (a bad image
# needs a USB re-flash) for the headroom to fit any build -- including the
# larger WiFi-standalone firmware -- on a 4MB part. Revisit if field OTA is
# needed: a dual-OTA 4MB table would cap each slot at ~1.7MB.
# data partition the firmware seeds its network config from at boot.
